name: Andretti Acquisition Corp. Class A Ordinary Shares
summary: Andretti Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company is focused on industries that align with the expertise of its management team and board of directors. Andretti Acquisition Corp. is headquartered in Indianapolis, Indiana.
